comment.body:
Everyone: remember the goals that Alma has laid out.  It's not EU compromising on a peace deal.  That would be step one towards the real eventual goal of a ceasefire and peace with Ukraine/Russia.  Trump needs the EU to negotiate so they can back off of wanting Ukraine continue its war with Russia.

The other goal is to defeat stagflation.

comment.body: The question is… who is trying to gap it up? And what does it mean that today’s and yesterday’s gap ups got smacked down? On one side, could be institutions trying to manipulate price to get above gamma resistance. On the other side, seems like institutions could be distributing on up ticks. Really a coin toss here whether this is a bull flag or bearish distribution.

comment.body: "Above the centroid it is a bit complicated, bcs we have shorter upside gamma, but above 5400 the speed profile goes positive, while tail-to-tail it is still remains negative.
